title: ceratostylis culminicola
intro: Ceratostylis culminicola, also known as the mountain orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Malaysia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis culminicola include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to be used in the treatment of various health conditions.
